case_title: MOORE, GEOFF et al VS CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENER et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLFT RECEIVED. RE: STIP CONTINUANCE.
THE COURT TO CONTINUE TRIAL TO ALLOW SUFFICIENT TIME TO EXECUTE AGREEMENT. CASE IS ALREADY CONTINUED TO 10/11/07 AT 1:30PM.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOORE, GEOFF MOORE, MACEO, (A MINOR LESS THAN 3) AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENER UNITED HEALTH GROUP AND ITS SUBSIDIARIES ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-21-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-11-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLFT'S REQUEST. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES COURT WILL DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE
